text:
LABEL: Managed Care Plan Type Code (Using Hierarchy) — January–December (01–12) 

DESCRIPTION: The managed care plan type: A model of health care delivery organized to provide a defined set of 
services in the month. There are separate variables for each of the 12 months during the year. 

SHORT NAME: MC_PLAN_TYPE_CD_01 
MC_PLAN_TYPE_CD_02 
MC_PLAN_TYPE_CD_03 
MC_PLAN_TYPE_CD_04 
MC_PLAN_TYPE_CD_05 
MC_PLAN_TYPE_CD_06 
 MC_PLAN_TYPE_CD_07 
MC_PLAN_TYPE_CD_08 
MC_PLAN_TYPE_CD_09
